Business: Pansari Developers Limited operates as a construction and real estate development company in India. The company constructs and develops residential and commercial properties; and sells residential units and land. Pansari Developers Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Kolkata, India.

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)

  Current: 15.57  (-1.52% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
